item.message: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
`--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.

item.command: /bin/zsh -lc 'set -- $(git rev-list --count HEAD) "$(git log --reverse --format=%s | sed -n '"'1p')\"; if [ \""'$1" = 121 ] && [ "$2 $3" = '"'ATS seed' ]; then echo OK; else echo FAIL; fi"

item.command: /bin/zsh -lc 'count=$(git rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null); oldest=$(git log --reverse --format=%s 2>/dev/null | sed -n '"'1p'); if [ \""'$count" = 121 ] && [ "$oldest" = '"'ATS seed' ]; then printf 'OK\\n'; else printf 'FAIL\\n'; fi"
